mechanics.buy_feature_meaning: Buy adds more exposure to the same side of the existing Kalshi contract at the current market price. It is not a hedge or cashout; it increases payout if the selected outcome wins and increases total risk if it loses.
mechanics.condition_to_win: Game total must finish 191 or lower. With 109 points at halftime, second half must stay at 82 points or fewer.

model_decision.recommendation: NO NIBBLE unless ultra-micro recreational add only
model_decision.reason: The +943 price looks attractive, but the game requires a 2H scoring collapse below 83 combined points after a 109-point first half. Detroit and Orlando both shot above 42% from three in the first half, and Q2 produced 67 points. Market value has collapsed to $0.34, showing the contract is priced as very unlikely.
model_decision.edge_vs_plus_943: insufficient / slightly negative unless true probability is above 9.6%
